# Launchbox

> Coworking space in DHA Phase 5, Lahore — for freelancers, remote workers, startups, and small teams. High-speed internet, backup power, professional environment, no lock-in contracts.

## Key facts

- **Location:** First Floor, 38-A CCA, Sector C, DHA Phase 5, Lahore 54000, Pakistan
- **Hours:** Monday–Saturday, 9 AM – 9 PM (closed Sundays)
- **Phone:** +92 307 0555515
- **WhatsApp:** https://wa.me/923070555515
- **Email:** contact@launchboxpk.com
- **Google rating:** 5.0 ★ (25 reviews)

## Pricing (PKR)

- Day Pass — 1,500 / day
- Flexible Desk — 15,000 / month (open seating, month-to-month)
- Dedicated Desk — 22,500 / month (always-reserved desk, includes meeting room hours, storage)
- Private Cabin — 20,000 / person / month (minimum 5 persons, 24/7 access, unlimited meeting room)

All plans include high-speed internet (150 Mbps fiber), backup power (UPS + generator), tea & coffee, common areas, kitchen, printing access. No deposits, no lock-in, cancel anytime.

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.launchboxpk.com/): Overview of the space and offering
- [Pricing](https://www.launchboxpk.com/pricing): All plans and what's included
- [Book a Visit](https://www.launchboxpk.com/book-visit): How to schedule a free walk-through
- [About](https://www.launchboxpk.com/about): Why Launchbox exists, the team, the philosophy
- [Services](https://www.launchboxpk.com/services): Detailed service offerings
- [Our Community](https://www.launchboxpk.com/our-community): The members who work here
- [FAQ](https://www.launchboxpk.com/faq): Common questions answered
- [Contact](https://www.launchboxpk.com/contact): Get in touch
- [Blog](https://www.launchboxpk.com/blog): Articles on coworking, freelancing in Pakistan, productivity

## Service area

Lahore, Pakistan — primarily DHA Phase 5 and surrounding sectors (Phase 4, Phase 6, Cantt, Gulberg, Model Town, Johar Town).

## Who it's for

- Freelancers (developers, designers, writers, consultants)
- Remote workers (employees of international companies based in Lahore)
- Founders and small startup teams
- Visiting professionals needing a temporary workspace
- Job-seekers preparing for video interviews

## Key differentiators

- Reliable backup power (UPS + generator) — work continues during LESCO outages
- 150 Mbps fiber with backup ISP
- No deposits, no lock-in contracts, month-to-month billing
- Free visit before commitment, no sales pitch
- Quiet, professional environment suitable for client calls

## Contact

For tours, plan questions, or bookings, message on WhatsApp (+92 307 0555515) or visit the space during business hours.
